title: Momentum
description: Full-stack task manager with authentication, task prioritization, and a Pomodoro timer. Built REST APIs and a responsive React UI, emphasizing clean architecture and scalable design.

title: BizConnect
description: Developed a fully functional prototype website for a hackathon with some friends, focused on connecting local businesses through innovative tech.

title: Weather API App (PyQt5)
description: Developed a weather app that retrieves and displays global weather data using a public API, helping me to learn more about APIs and Python's PyQt5 Module

title: Tetris
description: This was one of the first games I recreated using Python and Pygame. I used it to practice programming, work with graphics and input, and explore game logic.

title: Sonar Scanner
description: This is a project made to learn how ultrasonic sensors work.

title: Reaction Speed Game
description: This is a quick game I made using the ELEGOO UNO R3 Kit.

title: Pomodoro Timer
description: This is a simple recreation of the Pomofocus.io app using Python and Pygame.

title: Ultrasonic Distance Measurer
description: This is a  modified version of my Sonar Scanner.
